Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The key is to identify cases logical units of user work Given the log we see multiple documents and tasks Document1 docx drafting Email about Annual Meeting Report Draft pdf Budget 2024 xlsx and Quarterly Report docx

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The instructions say A case can represent a logical unit of user work such as editing a specific document handling a particular email or reviewing a certain PDF So we can treat each distinct document email thread as a separate case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets list the distinct objects from the log Quarterly Report docx Document1 docx Email Inbox handling an email about Annual Meeting Report Draft pdf Budget 2024 xlsx

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For case identification we can assign a unique case ID per task or document For example Case Quarterly Report docx Case Document1 docx Case Email about Annual Meeting Case Report Draft pdf Case Budget 2024 xlsx

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user works on Document1 docx then switches to email then to PDF then to Excel then back to Document1 docx then closes it then focuses on Quarterly Report docx So Document1 docx is a continuous case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In process mining we can treat each case as a separate process instance and events are ordered by time globally The case ID should group all events related to that particular piece of work

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Use the window title as the case identifier Each unique window document or email becomes a case

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The email window is Email Inbox but the actions Open Email about Annual Meeting Reply to Email and Send Email indicate a specific email thread We can treat that as a single case Email Annual Meeting

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So we have 5 cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Events that have a specific window are clear For example TYPING on Document1 docx case Document1 SAVE on Document1 case Document1 CLICK on Chrome with window Email Inbox case Email SCROLL on Adobe Acrobat Report Draft pdf case Report Draft

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For SWITCH events we could either ignore them or include them as part of the source or target case

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Better approach Use the window title as the case identifier Each unique window document or email becomes a case

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can treat SWITCH as an activity for the target case since it indicates the user moving to a new window

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For any event that sets focus to a particular window FOCUS or SWITCH we create an event Activate Document for the target case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Raw actions are FOCUS TYPING SAVE SWITCH CLICK SCROLL HIGHLIGHT CLOSE

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to standardize into meaningful process steps For example FOCUS on a document Open Document or Activate Document TYPING Edit Document SAVE Save Document

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For email clicks Open Email about Annual Meeting can be Open Email Reply to Email can be Compose Reply and Send Email stays Send Email

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In PDF SCROLL and HIGHLIGHT become Read PDF and Highlight Text

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Use a verb noun format Edit Document Save Document Close Document Open Email Send Email Highlight Text

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now we have events for each case We need to produce a table with columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp and optionally other attributes like Application and Window

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We include all FOCUS as Activate Document all SWITCH as Activate Document for the target all TYPING as Edit Document or Edit Spreadsheet all SAVE as Save Document or Save Spreadsheet all CLICK in email as Open Email Reply to Email or Send Email all SCROLL as Read Email or Read Document and CLOSE as Close Document

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Thus the final cases are Quarterly Report Document1 Email AnnualMeeting Report Draft and Budget 2024

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now we have 26 events each with case ID activity timestamp
